This game is honestly amazing in my opinion, I think there are qualities that could be better and I want to see more levels be introduced, but even for now this game is amazing, the first level made me have a heart attack, the second level was amazing and really fun to play. If I could change one thing I would add monsters to the third level but still it’s already amazing, this game is honestly fantastic and I hope they introduce lore.

reviews.review_description: When i played the game for the first time, it worked, but as soon as i played it other times/ loading it up again, the game didnt load, im just stuck on the meta loading screen with the freaking game audio in the background while i sit here getting pissed off. Make a upd on where you fix this.

First thing I did when trying to play this game was… load into a server with my friends. Although whenever I pressed buttons on the keyboard nothing happened!! I got mad and jumped down sector one myself. The game was fun single player but I want to play with me bois!

The game is very fun and scary, but it does not have a lot of content. At the moment there are 2 sectors and 3 monsters. 1 monster in sector 1 and 2 monsters in sector 2. The game is usually very active but sometimes you cannot get into a server due to the server being full. Other than that, I recommend giving this game a try!

Pros: the movement feels great, not bouncy or slow- perfect. The graphics are genuinely good, the monster isn't over-the-top, and it feels satisfying to pick up the fuses. Maps had good layouts and felt fun to navigate.
Looking forward to see where this goes.

Cons: Couldn't hear anyone and I doubt they could hear me. Sector 2 has no exit, so players who complete it are, without exception, all running around in circles trying to figure out where to go. Maybe hold off on the Early Access release until there's some form of End Point, or at least put a message ingame.

Me and my friends love to play this game together we have beaten all of the updates including the new level 3 that was released recently and wow it’s insane! A lot of scares and laughs would recommend to everyone who good with horror!

Well I go into the game brand new I play it for like a hour then I go on again after my vrs charged for the third time and for some reason I can’t get into a public server I mean I’m still in the game but without people it makes it less fun and obviously because vr has had a new update with all the menu on quest 2 which I don’t know if it’s happened to quest 3 or not but I don’t know how to uninstall it then download it back because of the new menu on quest 2 so I don’t know if there’s anyway of me joining a public server unless I delete the game then get it back but regardless the game is still great and it’s unique but there’s something about it that feels different from the others and I like it with like the animations and corpse and sounded it’s really good and the maps especially the first one I like the bumpy terrain for the first one and what adds to it the most is that for like some of the game like big scary for the first level of it you only have to escape to get into the next level and even though later in the levels you have to press buttons and stuff this is a bit more challenging and you are able to see the monster more which sounds bad but if you hardly even see the monster killing people it’s boring and so easy sorry for the long paragraph that I didnt have to do but I hope this helps (I feel dumb for saying this)
